label: 家具模板
description: 按「家具类型 + 朝向」程序化绘制可识别的室内家具 2.5D 剪影，渲染成灰度图（与房屋模板同角色：作形状底图喂给生图节点）。视角为 2.5D 斜投影（深度朝右上后退、能看到一部分顶面），而非纯水平立面。支持桌子/椅子/衣柜/床；朝向 下=正面 / 上=背面 / 左 / 右——并非每种家具都区分所有朝向（椅子四向皆有、床左右为侧影、衣柜正面有双门、桌子基本无朝向）。采用扁平灰度 + 外轮廓描边，使家具轮廓与部件接缝清晰可辨。输出灰度图（同时归档到顶层 .forgeax/grayscale/）。
description-en: Procedurally draw a recognizable 2.5D indoor-furniture silhouette from a furniture 'kind' + 'orientation', rendered as a grayscale map (same role as the house template: a shape base fed to the image-gen node). Uses a 2.5D cavalier-oblique view (depth receding to the upper-right so part of the top face is visible) rather than a flat elevation. Supports table/chair/wardrobe/bed; orientation down=front / up=back / left / right — not every kind distinguishes all orientations (chair has all four, bed shows a side profile for left/right, wardrobe has doors on the front, table is essentially orientation-agnostic). Flat grayscale + outline keeps the silhouette and part seams crisp. Output grayscale image(s); also archived under the top-level .forgeax/grayscale/.
icon: 深色画布上叠一把简化椅子的灰度立面剪影（座面+靠背+椅腿），扁平插画风格，主色青绿与深灰两种，小尺寸可辨。

inputs.name: kind
inputs.label: 家具类型
inputs.description: 要绘制的家具：table=桌子 / chair=椅子 / wardrobe=衣柜 / bed=床。
inputs.description-en: Furniture to draw: table / chair / wardrobe / bed.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.label: 朝向
inputs.description: 朝向：down=正面 / up=背面 / left=左 / right=右。并非每种家具都区分所有朝向——椅子四向皆有意义，床左右为侧影、下=床尾、上=床头，衣柜正面有双门、其余为素柜面，桌子各向同形。
inputs.description-en: Facing: down=front / up=back / left / right. Not every kind distinguishes all orientations — chair uses all four; bed shows a side profile for left/right, foot view for down, head view for up; wardrobe has doors on the front and plain faces otherwise; table looks the same in every direction.

outputs.name: image
outputs.label: 灰度图
outputs.description: 渲染出的家具灰度图引用（资产库 alias）；同时归档到顶层 .forgeax/grayscale/。
outputs.description-en: Rendered furniture grayscale image ref (asset-library alias); also archived under the top-level .forgeax/grayscale/.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误信息
outputs.description: 处理失败时的错误信息，成功时为空字符串。
outputs.description-en: Error message on failure; empty string on success.

params.name: imageSize
params.label: 图像尺寸
params.description: 输出灰度图的边长（像素，正方形）。

params.name: seed
params.label: 随机种子
params.description: 绘制随机变体（如桌腿数）的种子；0 = 使用非确定性随机。
params.description-en: RNG seed for drawing variants (e.g. table leg count); 0 = non-deterministic random.
